scripts.free:api-port: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$pids = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique; foreach ($procId in ($pids | Where-Object { $_ })) { try { Stop-Process -Id $procId -Force -ErrorAction Stop } catch {} }; Write-Output 'Port ready: 8000'"
scripts.free:ui-port: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$pids = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5173 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique; foreach ($procId in ($pids | Where-Object { $_ })) { try { Stop-Process -Id $procId -Force -ErrorAction Stop } catch {} }; Write-Output 'Port ready: 5173'"
scripts.free:ports: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$ports = 8000,5173; $allPids = @(); foreach ($p in $ports) { $allPids += (Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $p -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique) }; $allPids = $allPids | Where-Object { $_ } | Select-Object -Unique; foreach ($procId in $allPids) { try { Stop-Process -Id $procId -Force -ErrorAction Stop } catch {} }; Write-Output 'Ports ready: 8000,5173'"
scripts.run:api: npm run free:api-port && set PYTHONPATH=c:\Source\TAFMAsistance\TAFMAsistance\trading_bot&& c:\Source\TAFMAsistance\TAFMAsistance\.venv\Scripts\python.exe -m uvicorn src.ui_api:app --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 --app-dir c:\Source\TAFMAsistance\TAFMAsistance\trading_bot
scripts.run:ui: npm run free:ui-port && powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "if (-not (Test-Path 'trading_ui/node_modules')) { npm --prefix trading_ui install; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE } }; npm --prefix trading_ui run dev"
scripts.run:bot-ui: npm run free:ports && concurrently -n BOT,API,UI -c yellow,cyan,green "npm:run:bot" "npm:run:api" "npm:run:ui"
